_notes: Routes are matched top-to-bottom by URL-path prefix; list the most
env:NAME                     static API key from the proxy's environment
token-file:/path#a.b.c       JSON field read FRESH on every request
token-cmd:some command       stdout of a command, per request
auto:anthropic                API key, then host Claude OAuth with refresh
auto:openai                   API key, then host Codex OAuth with refresh
Point the box's env at this proxy (devbox --proxy handles it):

routes._comment: Anthropic / Claude — automatic mode. It prefers a host-side ANTHROPIC_API_KEY when configured, otherwise uses the host Claude Code OAuth login. The access token is read fresh on every request.
Codex logged in with ChatGPT uses this backend endpoint, rather than the public OpenAI API. The devbox profile selects it without storing host credentials in the guest.
OpenAI / Codex — automatic mode. It prefers OPENAI_API_KEY, otherwise uses and refreshes the host Codex OAuth login.
